reasoning: This workout directly targets your poor lactate clearance by implementing over-under intervals. During your last ride, you spent a lot of time at a lower wattage (159.7W), which doesn't sufficiently address the limiter for the Alpine Loop's sustained climbing demands.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 6x7 min intervals: 4 min at 201-218W, then 3 min at 242-256W. 2 min easy spin between each.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
